---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

Describe the problem or limitation this feature would address.
e.g. "I find it difficult to..."

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you would like to see. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you have thought about.

## Additional Context

Any mockups, examples from other tools, or relevant context.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have checked that this is not already covered in the [Roadmap](../../ROADMAP.md)
- [ ] I have searched existing issues for duplicates
